payload.action: Fix microvia API bug: SetViaType before SetLayerPair
payload.detail: Agent reads KiCad source, discovers SetLayerPair silently fails if called before SetViaType. Fixes ordering in generator.

payload.action: Microvia layer-pair ordering propagated to all via instances
payload.detail: Remaining 4 microvias had same bug. Systematic fix across generator.

payload.action: Lift F_CS1 escape horizontal to In1.Cu
payload.detail: F_CS1 charlieplex column crossing GND on F.Cu. Lift to In1.Cu eliminates 3 crossings.

payload.action: Split F_CS8 escape into two segments
payload.detail: Single long F.Cu run split at midpoint with via transition.

payload.action: MCU SCL escape + BTN riser repositioned
payload.detail: SCL pad escape angled to avoid GND via at y=237.
Shift SCL rail 0.3mm south to clear IS31FL3733 thermal pad.

payload.action: UPDI trace F.Cu → B.Cu layer lift
payload.detail: UPDI programming trace moved to B.Cu via blind via. Eliminates 5 crossings with GND.
GND return from connector doglegs east before heading south, avoiding SDA crossing.
I2C clock rail moved to inner layer 2, clearing 2 B.Cu crossings.
I2C data rail follows clock to In2.Cu. Eliminates 4 crossings.
Final segment of UPDI escape moved to In2.Cu.
GND via repositioned 0.9mm east to clear UPDI escape.

payload.action: R_SW6 In2.Cu lift attempt at jog_x=22.7
payload.detail: Strategist proposes lifting R_SW6 switch-row resistor to In2.Cu. DRC worsens by 5 — new crossings introduced on inner layer.
After revert, agent reads hotspot map, picks y+1.2mm offset. This time DRC drops by 4. The decision to revert and retry is what makes this agentic.

payload.action: Bulk decoupling cap relocation to south escape zone
payload.detail: Six decoupling caps moved south of driver ICs. Eliminates crossing congestion at IC escape channels.
C7 ground return takes east-first dogleg before south run, avoiding 9 escape crossings.

payload.action: R_SW6 full inner-layer lift (second attempt succeeded)
payload.detail: With caps relocated, the original R_SW6 lift now works. Context changed — same patch, different result.

payload.action: Cascade: all charlieplex column lifts to In1/In2.Cu
payload.detail: Pattern from successful lifts applied to all 16 charlieplex columns. Massive batch reduction.

payload.action: GND zone fill on all 4 layers
payload.detail: Copper fills added. Structural improvement for thermal + EMI. Some crossings eliminated by zone connections.
R2 ground return path changed, C8 shifted south 2mm.
Caps shifted 0.5mm increments to clear remaining crossings.

payload.action: Additional cap relocations and escape widening
payload.detail: Systematic sweep of remaining cap positions to minimize crossings.
Final adjustment to C7 detour geometry.

payload.action: Inner-layer lifts for remaining F.Cu crossings
payload.detail: Batch lift of remaining F.Cu traces that cross GND/power.
Final tuning of passive cluster near driver ICs.
I2C connection to second driver swapped to In1.Cu via offset.

payload.action: GND copper zones added (structural, +1 regression accepted)
payload.detail: Agent accepts +1 DRC trade-off for structural/thermal improvement. Deliberate decision.

payload.action: F_CA1/F_CA2/F_CA3 escape horizontals lifted to In1.Cu
payload.detail: Three charlieplex anode columns moved to inner layer.
Agent changes design rules: microvia drill 0.2mm (was 0.3mm). Enables transitions in tighter spaces.
With 0.2mm microvias available, F_CA4 can now transition to In1.Cu where it couldn't before.
Unused MCU pads assigned to GND, eliminating dangling-track violations.
SDA rail shifted 0.2mm to clear final crossing.

payload.action: Final elimination: remaining inner-layer lifts + via repositioning
payload.detail: Last 10 violations eliminated via coordinated lift of remaining outer-layer crossings. Board is clean.
